title: instructor concepts to equip instructors
body:
# instructor concepts to equip instructors
- [ ] a list of foundation elements to draw from to find the basis for milk instructions 
- [ ] how do we or what steps do we take to form a milk construction 
- [ ] how do we differentiate between a no-construction and a meat instruction 
- [ ] what should our working definition of instruction be
- [ ] how do we ensure that our instructions are actions practical and steps taken to make different choices rather than just information acquisition
- [ ] a working picture of an Ephesians 4:11 instructor

comments.author: TonyLinog
comments.body: One of my thoughts on this is maybe we could put the 10 words in milk or block talk. So we have a dynamic translation and a milk translation. Then that becomes another device or something for instructors to find those ideas in anything they read.

comments.author: joshualinog
comments.body:
> One of my thoughts on this is maybe we could put the 10 words in milk or block talk. So we have a dynamic translation and a milk translation. Then that becomes another device or something for instructors to find those ideas in anything they read. 

@TonyLinog this makes me so happy to see you contributing. And I completely agree. I got to do this! Help me this week? Be my gopher?

comments.author: TonyLinog
comments.body: Yes lets set aside an hour or two to work on this. When works for you???

comments.author: joshualinog
comments.body:
> Yes lets set aside an hour or two to work on this. When works for you???

Lovely said I should ask you what your windows are and she will rearrange me. So what are your windows for an hour or two this week? Two separate 1 hour sessions would probably be better than one long one.
